professional_summaries: Computer Science undergraduate specializing in data analytics, machine learning, and business intelligence. Experienced in analysing large datasets, building analytical dashboards, and developing data-driven solutions using Python, SQL, Power BI, and statistical modelling. Proven ability to convert raw data into actionable insights that improve operational efficiency, revenue, and decision-making.

Driven Computer Science student with a strong focus on Machine Learning, Natural Language Processing, Business Intelligence, Cloud Computing, and Computer Vision. Skilled in deploying AI models to derive strategic business value.

education.degree: BTech Computer Science Engineering - Artificial Intelligence

bullet_points: Built an end-to-end analytics system for MSME order operations, reducing manual processing errors by 90% through automated tracking and validation workflows.
Designed analytical dashboards using RFM segmentation, CLV analysis, and regression-based sales forecasting, contributing to a 20% increase in customer retention and 35% growth in monthly revenue.
Implemented structured data storage and reporting pipelines with cloud-based document handling and Excel exports, reducing data retrieval time by 40%.
Analyzed crop production patterns across 646 districts by preprocessing 1.5M+ agricultural data points in Python, uncovering key high-yield crops and regional variations.
Built Power BI dashboards to visualize multi-year crop trends, highlighting state-wise and seasonal yield variations for major crops.
Delivered analytical reports identifying post-2010 yield declines and optimization opportunities across sugarcane, wheat, potato, and coconut production.

projects.name: OrderEazy Analytics
bullet_points: Built a secure order management system supporting full CRUD operations, payment calculations, e-way bill uploads (PDF/images), delivery tracking, and role-based authentication.
Developed a centralized order management system that automated invoice and document workflows, reducing manual billing errors and credit note discrepancies by 90%.
Designed a comprehensive analytics module featuring revenue and quantity trends, customer activity metrics, CLV, retention insights, RFM segmentation, and sales forecasting.

Implemented RFM segmentation and sales forecasting models using Scikit-learn, while migrating legacy spreadsheet logs to a Supabase/PostgreSQL architecture, increasing repeat orders by 15% and improving query performance from 15 minutes to milliseconds.
Integrated an 'AI Business Analyst' module using Google Gemini 2.5 Flash to convert raw business metrics into plain-English insights, reducing executive reporting time by 70%.
Streamlined operational workflows by enabling Excel exports, seamless document handling, and a responsive interface with clear navigation.

projects.name: AI Stock News Sentiment
bullet_points: Engineered an autonomous discovery engine that monitors live financial news streams (MoneyControl, Economic Times, LiveMint), utilizing spaCy NER and ticker validation to automatically identify and filter NSE/BSE entities with 100% accuracy and zero noise.
Integrated a FinBERT NLP pipeline to perform context-aware sentiment synthesis on raw financial news, enabling high-precision detection of market signals and distinguishing complex financial nuances.
Built a high-performance analytics dashboard using Streamlit and FastAPI with background tasking to visualize sentiment distribution and time-series trends.

projects.name: Smart Notes Application
bullet_points: Engineered a full-stack AI-powered platform enabling secure PDF uploads, automated summarization, and conversational question answering, supported by authentication, cloud storage, and a daily usage quota system.
Integrated advanced NLP models to generate concise auto-summaries and context-aware chat responses, with features for note renaming, deletion, and structured dashboard organization.
Developed seamless PDF management workflows, real-time summaries, chat history retrieval, and polished exports to professionally formatted PDF documents.

projects.name: FaceGeo Attendance System
bullet_points: Constructed a secure, role-based attendance platform integrating facial recognition and geo-fencing to ensure fraud-proof, real-time check-ins with dual verification of identity and location.
Orchestrated dashboards for users and organizations, enabling attendance tracking, report exports, manual request workflows, and administrative controls for zone setup and user management.

Enhanced operational reliability by implementing location-bound validation, instant face matching, visual attendance analytics, downloadable summaries, and a streamlined user flow for daily check-ins.

projects.name: Crop Production Analysis
bullet_points: Processed and cleaned 20+ years of Indian agricultural records in Python, standardizing datasets and validating 1.5M+ entries to uncover long-term crop yield patterns and regional variations.
Derived crop productivity indicators (Production/Area) and enriched datasets with regional and crop-type classifications to enable deeper comparative evaluation of agricultural performance.
Designed interactive Power BI dashboards highlighting high-yield crops, leading states, and year-wise agricultural growth trends to support data-driven farming insights.
